CONTENT.Career: Born in Lutsk, Rubchynskyi is a product of Dnipro academy.In January 2018, he was promoted to the senior squad of Dnipro, and played in the Ukrainian Second League.In February 2019, he joined another club from Dnipro – Dnipro-1 and made his debut for the club in the winning match against Sumy on 12 April 2019 in the Ukrainian First League as a second-half substitute player.
CONTENT.External links: Valentyn Rubchynskyi at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Valentyn Rubchynskyi at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: In May 2024, Rubchynskyi was called up by Ruslan Rotan to the Ukraine Olympic football team squad to play at the 2024 Maurice Revello Tournament in France.

SUMMARY: Valentyn Mykolayovych Rubchynskyi (Ukrainian: Валентин Миколайович Рубчинський; born 15 February 2002) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Dynamo Kyiv.
